categories.name: Signature Rice
categories.description: Smoky, slow-cooked jollof, fragrant coconut rice, and ofada classics — each grain tells a story.

categories.name: Soups & Stews
categories.description: Egusi, efo riro, banga and pepper soup, prepared with care from family recipes passed through generations.

categories.name: Grills & Skewers
categories.description: Suya, asun and grilled fish kissed by open flame and dressed in our signature yaji rub.

categories.name: Swallows & Sides
categories.description: Pounded yam, amala, eba — silky, hand-crafted swallows to pair with every soup.

categories.name: Small Chops
categories.description: Puff puff, samosa, spring rolls and peppered chicken — the pulse of every Tanit table.

categories.name: Modern Fusion
categories.description: Where Nigerian flavor meets contemporary technique — jollof risotto, suya tacos, plantain gnocchi.

categories.name: Drinks
categories.description: House-made chapman, hibiscus zobo and craft sodas, served chilled and elegant.

categories.name: Desserts
categories.description: Caramel-glazed puff puff, coconut chin chin, and seasonal sweets to end on a high note.

products.name: Royal Jollof Rice
products.shortDescription: Slow-smoked over firewood with vine-ripened tomatoes, scotch bonnet and our heritage spice blend.
products.description: Our signature Royal Jollof is built on a base of fire-roasted plum tomatoes, red bell peppers and scotch bonnet, simmered for hours with bay leaf, thyme and the Tanit yaji blend. Long-grain parboiled rice is folded in and finished over low heat to develop the prized smoky party-jollof crust. Served with a piece of grilled chicken and caramelised plantain.

reviews.author: Adaeze O.
reviews.title: Like Sunday at home, only better
reviews.comment: The smoky depth is unreal. You can taste the firewood. Plantain was perfectly caramelised. This is the standard now.

reviews.author: Tunde A.
reviews.title: Worth every naira
reviews.comment: Travelled across town to try it and now I order weekly. The chicken is juicy, the jollof is restaurant grade.

reviews.author: Chiamaka E.
reviews.title: Beautifully balanced
reviews.comment: Heat level was just right for me. Could use a touch more salt but everything else was on point.

products.name: Coconut Jollof with Prawns
products.shortDescription: Toasted coconut milk jollof finished with garlic-butter tiger prawns and lime.
products.description: A coastal twist on our signature jollof — long-grain rice cooked in fragrant coconut milk and tomato until creamy and aromatic, then crowned with three garlic-butter tiger prawns and a wedge of grilled lime. Toasted coconut flakes on top for texture.

reviews.author: Ifeoma N.
reviews.title: Coastal in a bowl
reviews.comment: The coconut is subtle, never heavy. Prawns were huge and snappy.

reviews.author: David K.
reviews.title: My new favourite
reviews.comment: I rarely review food but this deserved it. Beautifully plated and the flavours sing.

products.name: Ofada Rice & Ayamase
products.shortDescription: Local stone-milled ofada rice with green pepper ayamase, assorted meats and boiled egg.
products.description: Earthy ofada rice steamed in ewe eran leaves and served with a slow-cooked green pepper ayamase, packed with assorted meats, locust bean and a perfectly soft-boiled egg. A heritage dish, served the way it was meant to be.

reviews.author: Bola S.
reviews.title: Authentic to the last bite
reviews.comment: Tastes exactly like my grandmother used to make. The iru hits different.

reviews.author: Femi O.
reviews.title: Spicy and hearty
reviews.comment: Bring milk. Worth it though.

products.name: Royal Egusi
products.shortDescription: Stone-ground melon seed soup with bitter leaf, goat meat, stockfish and shaki.
products.description: A masterclass in egusi. We stone-grind premium melon seeds and cook them slow in a bone broth enriched with palm oil, ground crayfish and locust bean. Finished with bitter leaf, goat meat, stockfish and shaki. Served with your choice of pounded yam or eba (sold separately).

reviews.author: Ngozi U.
reviews.title: Restaurant quality at home
reviews.comment: The bitter leaf to egusi ratio is perfect. Goat meat was tender, falling off the bone.

reviews.author: Kelechi M.
reviews.title: Take my money
reviews.comment: I order this twice a week. No notes.

reviews.author: Sade A.
reviews.title: Beautiful flavour
reviews.comment: Could use a little more crayfish for me but the depth is exceptional.

products.name: Efo Riro Royale
products.shortDescription: Hand-torn ugu and shoko greens in palm oil base with smoked turkey and ponmo.
products.description: Our take on the Yoruba classic — hand-torn pumpkin and amaranth leaves wilted into a smoked palm oil base with locust bean, scotch bonnet, smoked turkey and tender ponmo. Bright, peppery and deeply savoury.

reviews.author: Yemi T.
reviews.title: So fresh, so green
reviews.comment: The vegetables actually taste like vegetables. Smoky turkey is heavenly.

reviews.author: Obi N.
reviews.title: Comfort in a bowl
reviews.comment: Reminds me of Sundays at my mum's table. Beautiful work.

products.name: Banga Soup
products.shortDescription: Niger Delta palm fruit soup with catfish, beef and our beletete-banga spice blend.
products.description: Palm fruit pulp pressed in-house and simmered with catfish, beef, and our proprietary banga spice blend of beletete, oburunbebe and rohojie. Earthy, nutty and unmistakably Delta.

reviews.author: Ebi P.
reviews.title: Delta excellence
reviews.comment: Tastes like home in Warri. The beletete is on point.

reviews.author: Tare B.
reviews.title: Rich and warming
reviews.comment: Catfish was generous and fresh. Lovely depth of flavour.

products.name: Catfish Pepper Soup
products.shortDescription: Whole catfish in clear, fiery broth with scent leaves, ehuru and uziza.
products.description: A clear, intensely aromatic broth built from ehuru, uziza, calabash nutmeg and scent leaves, simmered with chunks of fresh catfish until tender. Cleansing, deeply spiced, and impossibly good for the soul.

reviews.author: Amaka R.
reviews.title: Cure in a bowl
reviews.comment: Had a cold, this fixed me in 24 hours. Unreal aromatic depth.

reviews.author: Henry I.
reviews.title: Spicy perfection
reviews.comment: Carried real heat without overpowering the fish. Beautifully balanced.

products.name: Tanit Suya Skewers
products.shortDescription: Charcoal-grilled beef skewers crusted in our 14-spice yaji blend.
products.description: Hand-cut sirloin marinated in groundnut oil and a 14-spice yaji blend, grilled hot and fast over charcoal until the edges char. Served with sliced onions, tomato and cabbage and a side of Tanit yaji dust.

reviews.author: Ola K.
reviews.title: The best suya in the city
reviews.comment: Crust is unreal. Yaji has the right peanut depth, not too dusty.

reviews.author: Mariam S.
reviews.title: Smoky perfection
reviews.comment: I taste the charcoal in every bite. Beef was tender, never dry.

reviews.author: Joseph A.
reviews.title: Worth the trip
reviews.comment: I drive 40 minutes for these and I'd drive 80.

products.name: Asun (Peppered Goat)
products.shortDescription: Smoked goat tossed in a blistered scotch bonnet pepper sauce.
products.description: Goat shoulder smoked low until tender, finished hot in a wok with blistered scotch bonnet, red onion and green pepper. Punchy, smoky and unapologetically hot.

reviews.author: Chinedu O.
reviews.title: Properly hot
reviews.comment: This is asun the way it should be. Smoke, heat, tenderness — all there.

reviews.author: Aisha B.
reviews.title: Phenomenal
reviews.comment: Goat was so tender it fell apart. Heat builds beautifully.

products.name: Grilled Tilapia
products.shortDescription: Whole tilapia rubbed with herbs, scored and grilled, served with pepper dip.
products.description: A whole tilapia scored, rubbed with garlic, ginger, thyme and our seafood spice, then grilled until the skin is crisp and the flesh flakes. Served with a side of fresh tomato pepper dip and grilled lime.

reviews.author: Tobi A.
reviews.title: Skin so crispy
reviews.comment: Skin shattered, flesh was perfectly cooked. Pepper dip was elite.

reviews.author: Linda C.
reviews.title: Fresh and clean
reviews.comment: Beautifully grilled and seasoned. Could use a touch more lime for me.

products.name: Pounded Yam Set
products.shortDescription: Hand-pounded white yam, silky smooth, wrapped warm.
products.description: Premium puna yam, boiled and hand-pounded the traditional way until silky and stretch. Wrapped warm and sealed for the perfect texture every time. Pairs with any soup.

reviews.author: Bisi O.
reviews.title: Stretchy and smooth
reviews.comment: Just like home. No lumps, no stickiness, perfect.

reviews.author: Kunle A.
reviews.title: How it should be done
reviews.comment: You can taste the care. Best pounded yam I've had outside of family.

products.name: Amala & Ewedu
products.shortDescription: Yam-flour amala paired with ewedu and gbegiri — the classic abula trio.
products.description: Smooth amala made from elubo, paired with bright green ewedu, rich gbegiri and a peppery stew. The sacred Yoruba trinity, served the way Ibadan intended.

reviews.author: Funke L.
reviews.title: Ibadan in Ilorin
reviews.comment: Authentic abula. The gbegiri was velvety, ewedu was draw and bright.

reviews.author: Wale A.
reviews.title: Beautiful balance
reviews.comment: Amala texture was on point. Loved it.

products.name: Small Chops Royale
products.shortDescription: Puff puff, samosa, spring rolls, peppered wings and meat pie — the full party platter.
products.description: Our flagship platter for two: golden puff puff, mini samosas, spring rolls, peppered chicken wings, mini meat pies and stick-meat suya, with sweet chili and yaji dips. The heart of any Tanit gathering.

reviews.author: Zainab Y.
reviews.title: Party in a box
reviews.comment: Ordered for a baby shower — it disappeared. Everything was hot, fresh and crisp.

reviews.author: Emeka D.
reviews.title: All the favourites
reviews.comment: Wings had real heat. Puff puff was light and airy. 10/10.

reviews.author: Hauwa M.
reviews.title: Best value on the menu
reviews.comment: Great variety, generous portions, beautifully packaged.

products.name: Moin Moin Trio
products.shortDescription: Three steamed bean cakes — classic, with fish and with egg.
products.description: Honey beans peeled and stone-blended with red pepper and onion, steamed gently in leaves until set. We serve three variations — classic, with smoked fish and with hard-boiled egg.

reviews.author: Grace I.
reviews.title: Pillowy soft
reviews.comment: Texture was spot on, beautifully seasoned.

reviews.author: Sam O.
reviews.title: Lovely classic
reviews.comment: Loved the egg version best. Great with jollof.

products.name: Jollof Risotto
products.shortDescription: Carnaroli risotto in jollof base, finished with parmesan and seared chicken.
products.description: A love letter to Ilorin and Lombardy — Carnaroli rice cooked low and slow in our jollof base, mounted with butter and parmesan and crowned with a perfectly seared chicken supreme. The hero of our modern fusion menu.

reviews.author: Olivia M.
reviews.title: Stunning concept
reviews.comment: I was skeptical and now I'm a convert. Creamy, smoky, perfectly al dente.

reviews.author: Daniel U.
reviews.title: Fine dining at home
reviews.comment: Would not be out of place at a Michelin tasting menu.

products.name: Suya Tacos
products.shortDescription: Three soft tortillas with suya beef, red cabbage slaw and yaji aioli.
products.description: Charcoal-grilled suya beef tucked into warm flour tortillas with crisp red cabbage slaw, pickled onion and a smoky yaji aioli. A west-meets-west handheld.

reviews.author: Jide O.
reviews.title: Inspired
reviews.comment: The yaji aioli is a stroke of genius.

reviews.author: Priya N.
reviews.title: So good
reviews.comment: I've ordered these four times this month. They never miss.

products.name: Plantain Gnocchi
products.shortDescription: Plantain gnocchi in brown butter sage with parmesan and toasted hazelnut.
products.description: Pillowy plantain gnocchi tossed in nutty brown butter and sage, finished with shaved parmesan and toasted hazelnut. Comforting, elegant, unexpected.

reviews.author: Mia C.
reviews.title: So creative
reviews.comment: The plantain sweetness against brown butter is unreal.

reviews.author: Sofia R.
reviews.title: Lovely texture
reviews.comment: Beautifully balanced. Would order again.

products.name: Chapman Reserve
products.shortDescription: House-made chapman with bitters, cucumber, citrus and grenadine.
products.description: Our reserve chapman: angostura bitters, fresh citrus, grenadine and cucumber tossed with sparkling lemon-lime soda. Bright, herbaceous, deeply nostalgic.

reviews.author: Tola B.
reviews.title: Childhood, bottled
reviews.comment: Tastes exactly like the chapman from my favourite restaurant growing up. Better even.

reviews.author: Rita E.
reviews.title: So refreshing
reviews.comment: Perfect with the suya. Goes down too easy.

products.name: Zobo Spritz
products.shortDescription: Hibiscus zobo with ginger, pineapple and a splash of soda.
products.description: Fresh hibiscus petals steeped with ginger, clove and pineapple, lengthened with chilled soda water. Floral, tart, gently spicy and ruby red.

reviews.author: Kemi F.
reviews.title: Floral and bright
reviews.comment: The ginger gives it a beautiful kick. Not overly sweet.

reviews.author: Adesuwa O.
reviews.title: Stunning colour and taste
reviews.comment: Could drink this every day. Very refreshing.

products.name: Puff Puff & Salted Caramel
products.shortDescription: Six golden puff puffs dusted in cinnamon sugar with warm salted caramel.
products.description: Six pillowy yeast-raised puff puffs, fried hot until golden, tossed in cinnamon sugar and served warm with a side of slow-cooked salted caramel for dipping. Pure joy.

reviews.author: Ada N.
reviews.title: Childhood reborn
reviews.comment: Light, airy and that caramel — wow. Don't share.

reviews.author: Lola J.
reviews.title: Dangerous
reviews.comment: Six was not enough.
